title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladyblock and Craft Noir
description:
Based on the TV show  "Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir"
Adds the miraculouses and their corresponding kwamis.
body:
## ![Logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/693/901/ladyblocklogo2.png)

_The recreated version of this project hasn't been released yet. Please wait for the first release to come! You can still play the old version._


[Join this discord server in order to contact the new owners.](https://discord.gg/ykw2nDrKqc)



Adds Miraculouses and their corresponding Kwamis into the game.
You can use your Kwami to transform into a superhero like Ladybug / Cat Noir, or a villain like Hawkmoth / Mayura.
Each Miraculous has its special power.
![Tikki Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db7cf3a57c3083b7381fefa56b3add6100efb730.png)
![KwamiOfCreation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0ff4101cbcebfef6941c28d1663ea40056618e2.png)
### "I am Tikki, the Kwami of Creation. I am everything that isn't yet and is yet to be."
Tikki is the kwami connected to the Ladybug Miraculous. With her power, Tikki's wearer can use the earrings to transform into a ladybug-themed superhero.
This kwami allows you to create a lucky object named "Lucky Charm" meant to help you in different situations.
Tikki enjoys eating macarons but you can also feed her with any other edible item except meat.

![TIKKI (RV)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a431f95cd90552bc8f5571e624b815a05b07a9d.png)
![Tikki Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db7cf3a57c3083b7381fefa56b3add6100efb730.png)
![Plagg Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/786945b9a38895bb5db3ba9f9daa0c1de443b69f.png)
![KwamiOfDestruction](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6ee569569f7bae9f73ef1a61ad1603c8df30225.png)
### "I am Plagg, the Kwami of Destruction. I am everything that is and no longer will be."
Plagg is the kwami connected to the Cat Miraculous. With his power, Plagg's wearer can use the ring to transform into a cat-themed superhero.
This kwami allows you to destroy everything you touch.
Plagg enjoys eating camembert but you can also feed him with any other edible item that isn't meat (except rotten flesh).
![PLAGG (RV)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/608ea8461f8785204cf507d9d35c5a07413d85f6.png)
![Plagg Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/786945b9a38895bb5db3ba9f9daa0c1de443b69f.png)

❤️❤️❤️ Thank you to Alextimus, UltimateJ7, and Damien Alcove for the original mod! ❤️❤️❤️
